case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP VS. STEPHEN COX et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP AS TO DEFENDANT COX, STEPHEN DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AS TO STEPHEN COX
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP SERVED JAN-30-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT COX, STEPHEN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COX, STEPHEN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COX, STEPHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANTS VACATED PREMISES ON FEBRUARY 14, 2012. $5,515.42 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $345.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,760.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER RE: USE OF COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS PER JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO.
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585 (D)). FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP
